program_metadata.program_name: BCS Cross Country Training Program v6

2025-08-04.description:
Easy Run
[Z2] Aerobic Base Building
Pace: 7:35-8:45 per mile
Effort: Conversational pace - can speak in full sentences

2025-08-05.description:
Tempo Run
[LT2] Threshold Training
2.5 miles easy + 1.5 miles at threshold pace + 1.5 miles easy
Pace: 6:15-6:25 per mile for threshold portion
Effort: Comfortably hard - can speak 3-4 words at a time

2025-08-06.description:
Recovery Run
[Z2] Active Recovery
Pace: 8:00-8:45 per mile (slower than easy pace)
Effort: Very easy, promote blood flow and aid recovery

2025-08-07.description:
Tire Pulls/Sled Pulls
[Strength/Z2] Resistance training
1.5 miles easy + 6 x 200m tire/sled pulls (90 sec recovery) + 2.5 miles easy
Effort: Maintain steady, strong effort (not pace-dependent)
Purpose: Strength endurance, low-impact conditioning

2025-08-08.description:

Pace: 7:35-8:45 per mile

2025-08-11.description:
Easy Run
[Z2] Aerobic Base Building

2025-08-12.description:
Cruise Intervals
[LT2] Lactate Threshold
1.5 miles easy + 4 x 4 minutes at threshold pace (90 sec recovery) + 1 mile easy
Pace: 6:15-6:25 per mile for intervals
Effort: Same as tempo run with brief recoveries

2025-08-13.description:
Recovery Run
[Z2] Active Recovery
Pace: 8:00-8:45 per mile (slower than easy pace)
Effort: Very easy, promote blood flow and aid recovery

2025-08-14.description:
School starts - afternoon practices start
Short Intervals
[NP] Neuromuscular Power
1.5 miles easy + 6 x 400m at repetition pace (2 min recovery) + 1.5 miles easy
Pace: 5:05-5:25 per mile for 400m repeats
Effort: Faster than 5K pace - 5-15 seconds per 400m faster

Race Day

2025-08-29.description:
Fartlek Run
[Mixed] Aerobic Power + Threshold
1.5 miles easy + 3 miles fartlek (30 sec hard / 90 sec easy x 12) + 1 mile easy
Pace: Hard efforts at 5:30-5:35 per mile, easy at 7:35-8:45
Effort: Playful speed work with varying intensities
